channel.title: International Review of Applied Linguistics in Language Teaching
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Review of Applied Linguistics in Language Teaching

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Sihan Zhou, Barry Bai, Yuanyue Hao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iral-2025-frontmatter1
